The following events took place in '''130 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]]'''.

==Events==
*[[Darth Stryfe]] became the [[Fist]] after [[Darth Nihl]] is made a [[Hand]].
*The [[One Sith]] take over [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].
*The [[Fel Empire]] briefly take over the [[The galaxy/Legends|Galaxy]].
*Return of the [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire|Galactic Empire]] to control of the galaxy.<ref name="Legacy 1" />
*The One Sith [[Battle of Coruscant (Sith–Imperial War)|captured]] the [[New Jedi Temple]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]<ref name="Legacy 8">[[Legacy (2006) 8|''Legacy'' (2006) 8]]</ref> and transformed it into the [[Temple of the Sith]]<ref name="Legacy 2" />
*The [[Jedi Academy (Ossus)|Jedi Academy]] on [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]] was [[Massacre at Ossus|massacred]] by the Sith, and the surviving [[New Jedi Order|Jedi]] were forced to evacuate the [[Planet/Legends|planet]], thus beginning the [[Third Jedi Purge]].<ref name="Legacy 1" />
*The [[Fel Empire]] split into [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire]] and the [[Empire-in-exile]]<ref name="Legacy 1" />
*[[Battle of Caamas|End]] of the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]] and birth of the [[Galactic Alliance Remnant]].<ref name="LECG">''[[Legacy Era Campaign Guide]]''</ref>
*End of the [[Sith–Imperial War]].<ref name="Legacy 0">[[Star Wars: Legacy (2006) 0|''Star Wars: Legacy'' (2006) 0]]</ref>
*Start of the [[Second Imperial Civil War]].<ref name="Legacy 8" />
*Start of [[Cade Skywalker]]'s apprenticeship under space [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Rav]].<ref name="Legacy 2" />

==Battles==
*Battle of Coruscant<ref name="Legacy 8" />
*Battle of Caamas<ref name="Legacy 8" />
*Massacre at Ossus<ref name="Legacy 1" />
*Attack on Emperor Fel<ref name="Legacy 1" />

==Deaths==

*[[Kol Skywalker]] on Ossus<ref name="Legacy 1" />
